# 🧬 CGT 每日情报 (Daily Brief)
> **日期**: 2026-04-21 | **更新时间**: 07:06 (北京时间)
> **监控范围**: Global (In vivo/FDA) & China (NMPA/Biotech)

---

## 🌍 全球前沿 (FDA / In vivo / MNCs)
- `[01:15]` **Verismo Therapeutics 在 AACR 2026 全体会议上公布了 SynKIR™-110 KIR-CAR STAR-101 1 期试验的初步临床数据**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Verismo Therapeutics' Initial Clinical Data from STAR-101 Phase 1 Trial of SynKIR™-110 KIR-CAR Presented at AACR 2026 Plenary Session* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[22:51]` **圣大卫南奥斯汀医疗中心在世界上第一个招募患者参加临床试验，评估侵袭性大 B 细胞淋巴瘤的下一代治疗方法**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *St. David's South Austin Medical Center first in world to enroll patient in clinical trial evaluating a next-generation treatment for aggressive large B-cell lymphoma* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[21:00]` **礼来公司收购 Kelonia Therapeutics 以推进体内 CAR-T 细胞疗法**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Lilly to acquire Kelonia Therapeutics to advance in vivo CAR-T cell therapies* [🔗Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMizgFBVV95cUxQM3cwOTRmS3h5WEFRemsxT1JuYjVLVlJlVE1rYUVxMVpEQlZSWVRaeFBwTnRmMHB3ZnN0SHpFQ0M4QlYyaWJWTTV4ZGZUSndxQi1RYU0tUEZ4YmpoLU5oWEZLSlVoUUZtRTQydnFiSVpTblR5a1VaYUpUOVdtZ1BybEZRSjVhYUhvNmFLZkR2RllhUXdsV0QwdnhLcmpjaWV4Qk9JV2tzVk05MVpVaDM1cWdmNmdhUlJwck8tc2JnVVRlV0hSVkFFVEFfZk1pdw?oc=5)</small>
- `[18:07]` **Nutritionofoco 在 AACR 2026 上展示体内 CAR-T 候选药物 IMV102 的临床前数据，展示持久的肿瘤控制**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Immunofoco Presents Preclinical Data for IMV102, an In Vivo CAR-T Candidate, Demonstrating Durable Tumor Control at the AACR 2026* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
